data.summary: The requirement to cancel penalty-free during the hold period is satisfied.
data.assessment: The linked use case explicitly states that customers can cancel their booking within the 1-hour hold period at no charge, which directly supports the requirement. Additionally, the prior step evidence confirms that bookings are processed with the expected hold period and cancellation policy, thus validating the requirement. The successful validation of the first explicit UC need further reinforces the coverage of this requirement.
